$comment: SYNTHETIC EXAMPLE — NOT a live registry export. This file documents the SHAPE of a skill-taxonomy record for the open contract. All names, owners and versions are placeholders; it carries no real skills, no real agent identities and no telemetry (runs, timings, usage counts are engine-side and deliberately absent).

id.description: Stable machine id of the skill record.

description.description: One-line statement of what the skill does.

owner_did.description: did:* of the AGENT that owns the skill — agents-not-people; NEVER a natural person.

evidence_class.description: Evidence tier backing the skill's claims (claim <= proof).

examples.name: example-skill-a
examples.description: Generic capability descriptor — placeholder for a routed skill.

examples.name: example-skill-b
examples.description: Second placeholder capability owned by a distinct agent.
